message:
refactor: Duration::from_mins in tests for readability

Additional from_secs(60) → from_mins(1) conversions in test code:

- observability/task_inspector.rs: config builder test stuck_threshold
- runtime/deadline_monitor.rs: MonitorConfig checkpoint_timeout (4 sites)
- server/shutdown.rs: begin_drain second-call rejection test
- web/middleware.rs: RateLimitPolicy period in rate limit tests (2 sites)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
